versions.version_description: Different key, some chord changes, optimized for use with autoscroll.

My version of "Kissed from a rose" is 4 semi-notes higher than the original. So it's especially suitable for higher voices. Some parts (like the bridge) are modified and were inspired by this cover https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C3ixiCgug-8 of the song. Every chord marked with a star is supposed to be played as a barre chord. You could also play the intro on your guitar instead of singing it. I hope you have fun playing it.
I couldn't find a complete version of the song with tabs for the "solos" and normal chords for the verses and choruses and lyrics for everything, so I made one based on the already existing ones.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
There used to be a graying tower alone on the sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
You became the light on the dark side of me[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Love remains a drug that's the high and not the pill[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Did you know that when it snows my eyes become large[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
And the light that you shine can't be seen[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
Baby, I compare you to a kiss from a rose on the gray[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
The more I get of you the stranger it feels, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]             [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
Now that your rose is in bloom, a light hits the gloom on the gray[/tab]

[tab] [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
There is so much a man can tell you, so much he can say[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
To me you're like a growin' addiction that I can't deny[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Won't you tell me is that healthy, babe?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
But did you know that when it snows my eyes become large[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
And the light that you shine can't be seen[/tab]
